0010110101011000 1100101110110101 0 -> sum: 1111100100001101, cout: 0
1110000011111011 0111001110101111 0 -> sum: 0101010010101010, cout: 1

0010101100001101 0011010010110111 0 -> sum: 0101111111000100, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
